perFrameCode: // Count sfree and pfree; pfree = len=0
loop (maxstrings, ibase = s*recsize; if (megabuf(ibase+3) > 0, sfree -=1; pfree -=megabuf(ibase+2), 0); s+= 1);
megabuf (pbase) = k1*dx0*gf; megabuf (pbase+1) = k1*dy0*gf; megabuf (pbase+2) = k1*dz0*gf;
megabuf(ibase +2) += newpts;  len   = megabuf (ibase+2);  pfree -= newpts;
ibase = s*recsize;  start = megabuf (ibase+1); len = megabuf (ibase+2);
n = 50030; loop (30, gmegabuf (n) = gmegabuf (n-1); n -= 1; ); gmegabuf (50000) = tvol;
